items.title: What does putting your feet on a salt lamp do?

expanded_element.title: Benefits of Salt Lamp Foot Detox - Lenehans.ie
expanded_element.description: When the light is on and the lamp is heated the salt lamps sweat, moistening the Himalyan Salt on the surface. When you place your feet on the surface your feet may also sweat. This binding of the salt and the body will act as a cleansing process.

items.title: Is Himalayan salt good for feet?

expanded_element.title: The Benefits of Himalayan Salt Foot Treatment for Detoxification
expanded_element.description: Minerals and nutrients necessary for healthy skin are abundant in Himalayan salt. Himalayan salt crystals assist to exfoliate dead skin cells when you soak your feet in warm water containing them, leaving your feet soft and smooth.

items.title: How many hours a day should a salt lamp be on?

expanded_element.title: Himalayan Salt Lamp Health Benefits - WebMD
expanded_element.description: You can keep your salt lamp turned on all day — at least 16 hours a day is ideal. But you'll have to change the bulb every so often.

items.title: What are the disadvantages of Himalayan salt lamps?

expanded_element.title: Himalayan Salt Lamp Warnings: Safety Tips, Plus Authentic vs. Fake
expanded_element.description: Faulty dimmer switches are the biggest known risk of Himalayan salt lamps. Some products were recalled because they overheated and ignited. Other risks include danger to pets (from licking salt) and corrosion. Himalayan salt lamps are popular for their vibrant pink hue, organic shapes, and much-touted health benefits.
